creator: tom@eborcom.com
text:
The Mutt port deletes its "Muttrc" and "mime.types" configuration
files from ${PREFIX}/etc. These configuration files may have been
edited locally and so should not be deleted.

How-To-Repeat: 
# cd /usr/ports/mail/mutt
# make install
# $EDITOR /usr/local/etc/Muttrc
# $EDITOR /usr/local/etc/mime.types
# make deinstall
# cat /usr/local/etc/Muttrc /usr/local/etc/mime.types
